title: holcus × sudanensis
intro: Holcus × sudanensis, also known as Sudan grass, is a hybrid forage grass between the tall fescue (Festuca arundinacea) and the giant foxtail (Setaria pumila). It is valued for its high yield, drought tolerance, and ability to grow in a variety of soil types. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. Sudan grass can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting digestion, and supporting immune function.
